overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage walking through a gothic castle courtyard at night. The character traverses cobblestone paths past a central fountain, alongside illuminated medieval architecture with prominent stained glass windows. Atmospheric lighting from street lamps contrasts with the dark blue cloudy sky.

events.description: character in dark robes passes by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the main castle building with the fountain visible ahead

notable_agents.action: character in dark robes walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated gothic castle with multiple spires and towers dominating the background
multi-tiered stone fountain in the center of the courtyard approach
wet reflective cobblestone pathway leading toward the castle
black iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cobblestone path leading toward a massive gothic castle at night. Warm lamplight illuminates the wet stones while the castle looms ahead with glowing windows. An NPC in dark robes passes by on the right as the camera approaches a central fountain.

events.description: passing the central stone fountain on the right side
turning left to walk along the castle wall perimeter

agents.ego_description: navigating around the fountain and turning to follow the castle perimeter wall

entered.detail: tall thin spire visible in the distance against the cloudy night sky
grassy area with scattered bushes alongside the cobblestone path

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the central stone fountain and turns left to walk alongside the castle wall. The massive gothic structure now dominates the left side of the frame with its illuminated windows, while a grassy lawn opens up on the right. The fountain recedes behind as the path curves along the building.

agents.ego_description: walking along the castle wall with the illuminated building on the left and open lawn on the right

entered.detail: large illuminated stained glass windows with colorful religious figures visible on the castle wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the castle's exterior wall, the path continues with the massive gothic structure on the left and open grounds on the right. Large stained glass windows come into view ahead, glowing with warm colored light from within. The scene is quiet with no other characters present.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full height of the tall stained glass windows
moving past the stained glass section to plain castle wall

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the detailed stained glass windows, looking up at the artwork before continuing past

entered.detail: small arched doorway at the base of the stained glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the illuminated stained glass windows very closely, tilting upward to reveal the detailed colorful artwork depicting religious figures. After admiring the windows, the camera continues past them to the plain castle wall beyond, with the stained glass receding behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide approach of a gothic castle toward an intimate view of its ornate architectural details. It begins on a wet cobblestone path illuminated by warm lamplight, moving past a robed figure toward a central stone fountain. As the camera passes the fountain, it turns left to follow the curve of the massive castle wall, leaving the fountain behind as a grassy lawn opens up to the right. The scene then shifts focus toward the building's exterior, where the path leads directly toward large, glowing stained glass windows. Finally, the camera tilts upward to closely examine the colorful religious artwork within the glass before continuing forward along the plain stone wall.
